name: voicecheck-monorepo
description: VoiceCheck by mosADD — honest, on-device voice-deepfake detection (MIT).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mosadd/threat-engine && npm run build -w @mosadd/detection-sdk && npm run build -w @mosadd/voice-analyzer-core && npm run build -w @mosadd/voicecheck
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run example
